chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application No. 284 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA No. 1884/19 (stay) 17.12.2025 Mr. Shamshad Ahmed, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of applicant, which is taken on record. This reference is pending since 2019 without any progress. On 11.01.2021 and 18.02.2021, time was sought to file reformulated questions of law. Same is the case today. There appears to be no reason to perpetuate this reference pending without any progress for more than six years. Dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 63 of the Sindh Sales Tax on Services Act, 2011. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
